about.metaDescription: Learn about AKMLEVA's story, team, values, certifications and partners. A Portuguese travel agency powered by artificial intelligence.
about.ourStory: AKMLEVA was born from a passion for exploring the world and the belief that every journey should be a transformative experience. Founded with the goal of going beyond conventional tourism, we seek to create itineraries that not only showcase destinations but also connect travelers with local culture and the essence of each place.
about.ourStory2: We believe that the true richness of a journey lies in the memories created, the people met, and the broadened perspectives. That's why every detail is carefully planned to exceed expectations, from the choice of accommodations to the most authentic activities.
about.ourStory3: Since our foundation, we have dedicated ourselves to turning dreams into reality.
about.whereWereFromSubtitle: Our roots and the land that inspires everything we do
about.whereWereFromText1: AKMLEVA was founded in Santa Maria da Feira, a historic town in northern Portugal known for its majestic medieval castle and deep-rooted traditions. Surrounded by the green hills of the Entre Douro e Vouga region, our headquarters sit at the crossroads of innovation and heritage.
about.whereWereFromText2: Portugal's spirit of discovery runs through our veins. From here, we design journeys that carry the same boldness as the Portuguese navigators who once set sail to discover the world. Every trip we curate reflects the warmth, authenticity, and hospitality that define our homeland.
about.whereWereFromText3: Just 20 minutes from Porto and 30 minutes from Aveiro, we are perfectly placed at the heart of northern Portugal — a land of castles, vineyards, and unforgettable landscapes that remind us daily why travel matters.
about.leadershipSubtitle: Meet those who transform vision into reality and ensure excellence in every service provided.
about.ceoBio: With extensive experience in the tourism sector, he leads AKMLEVA with the vision of transforming every trip into a unique and personalized experience.
about.valuesSubtitle: We are guided by principles that guarantee authentic and memorable experiences.
about.value1Desc: We create unique itineraries, tailored to your desires and needs.
about.value2Desc: We promote responsible travel that respects the environment and local communities.
about.value3Desc: We operate with complete transparency and honesty in all interactions.
about.certificationsSubtitle: Committed to excellence and compliance in all aspects of our service
about.cert1Desc: National Registry of Travel and Tourism Agencies (RNAVT).
about.cert2Desc: Support for entrepreneurship and innovation through startup incubation and acceleration.
about.partnershipsSubtitle: We collaborate with the best to offer you the best.
about.partner1Desc: Partnership with GEA Group, the largest network of independent travel agencies in Portugal, ensuring access to a wide range of exclusive services and conditions.
about.partner2Desc: Strategic partnership with IAPMEI - Agency for Competitiveness and Innovation, providing entrepreneurship support, financial incentives, and access to business competitiveness programs.
about.partner3Desc: Collaboration with the Science and Technology Park of São João da Madeira, driving innovation and technological development in the tourism sector.
about.partner4Desc: Official partnership with Turismo de Portugal, ensuring access to national destinations and quality certification of our tourism services.
about.partner5Desc: Specialized consulting in management and strategy, ensuring the optimization of our processes and the excellence of our services.
about.partner6Desc: Collaboration with Startup Portugal, integrating us into the national innovation and startup ecosystem, facilitating networking and access to investment and growth opportunities.
about.contactSubtitle: Your next great adventure starts with a simple conversation. Leave the logistics to us and focus on the memories.
about.address:
Rua São Nicolau, 9
4520-248 Santa Maria da Feira
about.ceoBioSection1: At 28 years old and with a Master's degree in Marketing and Digital Business completed in 2022, I consolidated my academic journey with a strategic internship at AICEP.
about.ceoBioSection2: My professional trajectory is defined by versatility, with solid experience in sectors as diverse as hospitality, consulting, telecommunications, accounting and textile industry. I also complemented my commercial profile with certifications in credit intermediation and insurance mediation.
about.ceoBioSection3: Recently, I specialized in developing solutions using Artificial Intelligence. It was this intersection between technology and my passion for tourism that gave rise to AKMLEVA: an innovative travel agency that uses AI to personalize and accelerate the discovery of ideal destinations for each client.
about.ceoBioSection4: I founded this project with the mission of democratizing access to new cultures. I firmly believe that traveling is an engine of tolerance and humanism, making us more sensitive to the world around us. At AKMLEVA, we unite the efficiency of cutting-edge technology with the purpose of connecting people to transformative global experiences.

faq.metaDescription: Find answers to frequently asked questions about AKMLEVA's services, bookings and features.
faq.pageSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services
faq.noResults: No questions found matching your search.
faq.ctaBody: Our team is here to help you with any questions you may have.

faqs.question: How do I make a booking?
faqs.answer: You can make a booking through our website by clicking "Get Started", filling out your travel preferences, and selecting from our personalized recommendations. You can also contact us directly by phone or email for assistance.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking at least 2-3 months in advance for international trips and 1 month for domestic travel. However, we can accommodate last-minute bookings depending on availability.

faqs.question: Can I modify my booking after confirmation?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can modify your booking subject to availability and the terms of the service providers. Modification fees may apply depending on how close to the departure date you make the change.

faqs.question: What information do I need to provide when booking?
faqs.answer: You'll need to provide full names (as they appear on passports), dates of birth, contact information, passport details for international travel, and any special requirements or preferences.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), debit cards, bank transfers, and MB Way. Payment plans are available for bookings over €1000.

faqs.question: When do I need to pay?
faqs.answer: A deposit of 30% is required at the time of booking. The remaining balance is due 30 days before departure. Different terms may apply for last-minute bookings.

faqs.question: Are there any hidden fees?
faqs.answer: No, we provide transparent pricing. All fees, taxes, and charges are clearly displayed before you confirm your booking. The price you see is the price you pay.

faqs.question: Do you offer group discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer special rates for groups of 10 or more people. Contact us directly for a customized quote and group booking terms.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellations more than 30 days before departure: 20% retention fee. 15-29 days: 50% retention. Less than 14 days: no refund. Different terms may apply for specific services.

faqs.question: How long does it take to receive a refund?
faqs.answer: Refunds are processed within 7-14 business days after cancellation approval. The funds will be returned to your original payment method.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund if I have to cancel due to illness?
faqs.answer: If you have travel insurance, medical cancellations are typically covered with proper documentation. Without insurance, standard cancellation fees apply. We strongly recommend purchasing travel insurance.

faqs.question: What happens if the airline cancels my flight?
faqs.answer: If a flight is cancelled by the airline, we will work with you to rebook on the next available flight at no extra cost, or provide a full refund if you choose not to travel.

faqs.question: Do I need travel insurance?
faqs.answer: While not mandatory, we strongly recommend travel insurance to cover unexpected events like trip cancellations, medical emergencies, lost luggage, and travel delays.

faqs.question: What does your travel insurance cover?
faqs.answer: Our recommended travel insurance covers trip cancellation, medical emergencies, lost or delayed luggage, travel delays, and emergency evacuation. Specific coverage varies by plan.

faqs.question: Are your bookings financially protected?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are registered with the Portuguese Tourism Authority and contribute to the Travel and Tourism Guarantee Fund (FGVT), which protects your payments in case of insolvency.

faqs.question: What safety measures do you have in place?
faqs.answer: We work only with certified partners, monitor travel advisories, provide 24/7 emergency support, and ensure all our services meet safety and quality standards.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa for my destination?
faqs.answer: Visa requirements vary by destination and nationality. We provide guidance on visa requirements, but it's your responsibility to ensure you have the correct documentation. We recommend checking at least 3 months before travel.

faqs.question: What documents do I need to travel?
faqs.answer: At minimum, you need a valid passport (valid for at least 6 months beyond your return date). Depending on your destination, you may also need visas, vaccination certificates, or other specific documents.

faqs.question: Can you help with special requirements (dietary, mobility, etc.)?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We can arrange special meals, wheelchair access, medical assistance, and other accommodations. Please inform us of any special requirements when booking.

faqs.question: What if there's a travel advisory for my destination?
faqs.answer: We monitor all travel advisories and will inform you immediately if any are issued for your destination. You may be able to change your destination or receive a refund depending on the severity and your insurance coverage.

faqs.question: How does your AI-powered service work?
faqs.answer: Our AI analyzes your preferences, budget, travel dates, and interests to recommend personalized destinations and itineraries. It saves you time by filtering thousands of options to find the perfect match for you.

faqs.question: Do you offer packages or custom trips?
faqs.answer: We offer both! Choose from our curated packages or let us create a completely customized itinerary tailored to your specific needs and preferences.

faqs.question: What is included in your service fee?
faqs.answer: Our service fee covers personalized consultation, booking management, 24/7 support during your trip, and assistance with any issues that may arise. We also negotiate the best rates with our partners.

faqs.question: How can I contact you during my trip?
faqs.answer: We provide 24/7 emergency support via phone, email, and WhatsApp. You'll receive emergency contact numbers and your dedicated travel consultant's details before departure.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of AKMLEVA's website, AI-powered travel planning tools, and related services. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.section1: By accessing or using AKMLEVA's services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and customers who access or use our services. We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time, and we will notify you of material changes via email or a prominent notice on our website.
terms.section2: When you create an account with AKMLEVA, you must provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information. You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms.section3: AKMLEVA provides AI-powered travel planning, personalized destination recommendations, and booking facilitation through third-party providers. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee the availability, pricing, or quality of third-party services. All bookings are subject to the terms and conditions of the respective service providers. We recommend purchasing travel insurance for all trips.
terms.section4: All content, trademarks, logos, and intellectual property displayed on our website and services are owned by or licensed to AKMLEVA. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works from our content without our prior written consent. User-generated content, including reviews and feedback, may be used by AKMLEVA for marketing and service improvement purposes.
terms.section5: AKMLEVA shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services. Our total liability for any claim arising from these Terms shall not exceed the total amount paid by you for the specific service giving rise to the claim. Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations of liability, so these limitations may not apply to you.
terms.governing: These Terms are governed by Portuguese law. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Santa Maria da Feira, Portugal.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how AKMLEVA collects, uses, discloses, and safeguards your personal data when you use our website and services. We are committed to protecting your privacy in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Portuguese data protection laws.
privacy.section1: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, passport details, travel preferences, and payment information. We also automatically collect certain information when you use our services, including IP address, browser type, device information, and usage patterns. Cookies and similar tracking technologies are used to enhance your experience.
privacy.section2: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our travel planning services, process bookings and payments, send travel confirmations and updates, personalize your experience with AI-powered recommendations, communicate with you about our services, and comply with legal obligations. We may also use anonymized data for analytics and service improvement.
privacy.section3: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your data with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our business, such as airlines, hotels, payment processors, and IT service providers, subject to strict data processing agreements. We may also disclose information when required by law or to protect our rights and safety.
privacy.section4: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Privacy Policy, or as required by law. We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction, including AES-256 encryption and secure data centers.
privacy.section5: Under applicable data protection laws, you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing of, and port your personal data. You may also object to certain processing activities, including direct marketing. To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@akmleva.pt. We will respond to your request within the timeframe required by law.
privacy.commitment: We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data in accordance with GDPR and applicable data protection laws.

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliance
gdpr.intro: AKMLEVA is committed to protecting your privacy and personal data in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This document explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information.
gdpr.section1: AKMLEVA - Travel and Tourism Agency, Ltd. is the entity responsible for processing your personal data under GDPR terms.
gdpr.controllerEntity: AKMLEVA - Travel and Tourism Agency, Ltd.
gdpr.controllerAddress: R. São Nicolau 9, 4520-248 Santa Maria da Feira, Portugal
gdpr.controllerNote: These contacts are exclusively for personal data protection matters.
gdpr.section2: We process the following categories of personal data for the purposes described below.
gdpr.tableCatIdEx: Full name, email, phone, ID document, date of birth
gdpr.tableCatContactEx: Postal address, phone, email, communication preferences
gdpr.tableCatBookingEx: Travel details, accommodation preferences, payment info, booking history
gdpr.tableCatTechnicalEx: IP address, cookies, browsing data, device used, approximate geolocation
gdpr.tableNote: Retention periods may be longer when required by law or shorter in case of rights exercise by the data subject.
gdpr.section3: We process your personal data only for specific, explicit, and legitimate purposes in compliance with GDPR.
gdpr.purpose1Desc: Processing bookings, client communication, travel and tourism services.
gdpr.purpose2Desc: Newsletters, special offers, promotional communications, satisfaction surveys.
gdpr.purpose3Desc: Tax, accounting, and regulatory compliance in tourism sector.
gdpr.purpose4Desc: Service improvement, data analysis for customer experience optimization.
gdpr.purposeNote: We do not process your data for purposes incompatible with those described here without a new legal basis or your explicit consent.
gdpr.section4: GDPR grants you several powerful rights over your personal data. You can exercise them at any time by contacting us through the contacts indicated in the Data Controller section.
gdpr.right1Desc: Request information about personal data we process about you.
gdpr.right2Desc: Request correction of incorrect or incomplete personal data.
gdpr.right3Desc: Request deletion of your personal data in certain circumstances.
gdpr.right4Desc: Request limitation of processing your personal data.
gdpr.right5Desc: Request transfer of your data to another service provider.
gdpr.right6Desc: Object to processing of your personal data in certain situations.
gdpr.right7Desc: Withdraw your consent at any time, when applicable.
gdpr.right8Desc: Lodge a complaint with the National Data Protection Commission (CNPD).
gdpr.rightsFooter: To exercise any of these rights, simply contact us at privacy@akmleva.pt. We will respond within a maximum of one month (extendable in complex cases).
gdpr.section5: We adopt adequate and updated technical and organizational measures to ensure a level of security proportional to the risk, in compliance with Article 32 of GDPR.
gdpr.security1: Encryption of data in transit and at rest (SSL/TLS)
gdpr.security2: Role-based access control and multi-factor authentication
gdpr.security3: Continuous security monitoring and intrusion detection
gdpr.security4: Regular employee training in data protection
gdpr.security5: Periodic security audits and impact assessments
gdpr.security6: Secure backup and disaster recovery plans
gdpr.security7: Pseudonymization and data minimization whenever possible
gdpr.securityWarning: Despite implemented measures, no system is 100% immune to risks. In case of data breach, we will notify the supervisory authority and affected individuals within legal timeframes.
gdpr.section6: To exercise any of your rights under GDPR or clarify doubts about processing your personal data, you can contact us through the following means:
gdpr.contactResponse: We will respond as quickly as possible and always within the legal timeframes provided in GDPR.
gdpr.footerCompliant: This document is fully compliant with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable national legislation.
gdpr.footerItalic: Commitment to transparency and protection of your rights.

cancellations.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellations.warningText: To ensure transparency, we detail the applicable conditions. We recommend careful reading.
cancellations.section1a: All requests must be made in writing via email.
cancellations.section1b: Calculation is based on the date of receipt of the request.
cancellations.section1c: Service and administrative fees are non-refundable.
cancellations.section2a: Cancellation more than 30 days in advance: 20% retention fee.
cancellations.section2b: Cancellation between 29 and 15 days: 50% retention fee.
cancellations.section2c: Cancellation less than 14 days: No refund.
cancellations.section3: Flight cancellation policies are dictated by airlines and may be 100% non-refundable.
cancellations.forceMajeureText: In case of cancellation due to force majeure (pandemic, natural disasters, etc.), special conditions apply. Contact us for more information.
cancellations.section4Intro: The process is simple and automatic through your customer area.
cancellations.step1Desc: The fastest and safest way is through the official support email.
cancellations.step2Desc: Please provide your booking number, full name, and reason for cancellation.
cancellations.step3Desc: You will receive an email confirmation with processing details.
cancellations.ctaDesc: Our team is here to help
cancellations.section5Intro: Find quick answers to your most common questions.
cancellations.faq1Question: Can I cancel my booking online?
cancellations.faq1Answer: Yes, you can initiate the cancellation process through your customer area or by contacting our support team via email.
cancellations.faq2Question: How long does the refund take?
cancellations.faq2Answer: Refunds are typically processed within 14-30 business days after approval, depending on your payment method and financial institution.
cancellations.faq3Question: Can I modify instead of cancel?
cancellations.faq3Answer: Yes! Modifications may be available depending on your booking conditions. Contact us to explore your options before canceling.
cancellations.faqFallback: Didn't find the answer you were looking for? Contact us

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookies Policy explains how AKMLEVA uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website. It explains what these technologies are, why we use them, and your rights to control our use of them.
cookies.section1p1: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to website owners.
cookies.section1p2: Cookies set by the website owner (in this case, AKMLEVA) are called first-party cookies. Cookies set by parties other than the website owner are called third-party cookies.
cookies.section2Essential: Essential cookies: Required for the website to function properly
cookies.section2Functional: Functional cookies: Remember your preferences and choices
cookies.section2Analytics: Analytics cookies: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website
cookies.section2Marketing: Marketing cookies: Deliver relevant advertisements and measure campaign effectiveness
cookies.catEssentialDesc: These cookies are strictly necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off.
cookies.catFunctionalDesc: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization.
cookies.catAnalyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website.
cookies.catMarketingDesc: These cookies track your online activity to deliver relevant advertisements.
cookies.section4Intro: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie preferences by:
cookies.controlBannerDesc: When you first visit our website, you can choose which categories of cookies to accept through our consent banner.
cookies.controlBrowserDesc: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. However, blocking all cookies may impact your ability to use certain features of our website.
cookies.controlBrowserChrome: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and Security → Cookies and other site data
cookies.controlBrowserFirefox: Firefox: Preferences → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
cookies.controlBrowserSafari: Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
cookies.controlBrowserEdge: Edge: Settings → Privacy, search, and services → Cookies
cookies.controlThirdDesc: You can opt out of third-party cookies through:
cookies.section5: We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. Please revisit this page regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies.
cookies.contactText: For questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at:

enhancedTravelPreferencesForm.budgetPriorityQuestion: How do you prioritize your budget?

dailyBudget.title: Traveler Profile (Daily Budget)
dailyBudget.subtitle: Choose how you want to spend at the destination. The estimate uses minimum, average, or maximum prices per item — meals, transport, and attractions.
dailyBudget.disclaimer: Illustrative values from real CSV data (Numbeo-style). At the destination we use offline city budgets when available.

mochileiro.title: Backpacker (Low-Cost)
mochileiro.meals: Breakfast (supermarket) + lunch (cheap restaurant) + dinner (street food or supermarket). Uses the minimum price for each item.

conforto.title: Comfort Traveler (Mid-Range)
conforto.meals: Breakfast (café) + lunch (mid-range restaurant) + dinner (mid-range restaurant). Uses the average price for each item.

luxo.title: Luxury Traveler (Top Tier)
luxo.meals: Breakfast (hotel) + lunch (fine dining) + dinner (fine dining). Uses the maximum price for each item.

enhancedTravelPreferencesForm.cabinDuffelNote: Cabin values follow Duffel offer slices (Duffel API).
enhancedTravelPreferencesForm.amenitiesHotelbedsNote: Facility list from Hotelbeds Content API (codes stored on save).

auth.agreeToTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.registerSuccess: Account created successfully! Welcome to AKMLEVA.
auth.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions

results.metaDescription: Personalized AI travel results. Discover destinations, flights and hotels recommended for you by AKMLEVA.
results.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your filters to see more options
results.title: Your Personalized Travel Recommendations
results.subtitle: AI-curated destinations based on your preferences
results.loadingLiveResults: Loading live flight and hotel options from Duffel and Hotelbeds…
results.searchOptionsDesc: Origin, destinations (IATA or city), budget profile, and flight source are sent to the search API (URL).
results.noCruiseResults: No cruise voyages returned. Try another region, dates, or budget.
results.loadingCruiseResults: Loading luxury cruises from Siloah Travel…
results.returnDateHint: Must be after departure. If omitted, departure + nights is used on the server.
results.noLiveResults: No live offers returned. Check Duffel credentials, dates, and routes.
results.noHotelResults: No hotel results returned. Check Hotelbeds credentials and dates.
results.matchExplain: Match probability from your preferences (activities, budget, style)
results.liveOffersSubtitle: Indicative or live prices depending on configured APIs (Duffel, Hotelbeds, demo).

recommend.title: Destinations for your budget & interests
recommend.subtitle: Estimated stay, meals, local transport and flights from the Wikivoyage catalog — not a live price guarantee.
recommend.loading: Finding destinations that fit your profile…
recommend.empty: No destinations within budget for these filters. Increase budget or change preferences.
recommend.estimateNote: Catalog estimates; use «Search offers» for current prices.

destinationsBrowse.title: Explore destinations
destinationsBrowse.metaDescription: Search and explore thousands of travel destinations worldwide. Find hotels, attractions and travel info with AKMLEVA.
destinationsBrowse.subtitle: Search and filter thousands of destinations from our Wikivoyage catalog.
destinationsBrowse.emptyHint: Try a different search term or remove filters.
destinationsBrowse.famousSubtitle: Curated world-famous places every traveler should visit at least once.

destination.metaDescription: Discover {name} with AKMLEVA. Travel information, hotels, attractions and tips for your trip.
destination.tipsTitle: Tips to travel like a local
destination.budgetHint: Offline estimate (Kaggle CSV). USD values, indicative only.
destination.transportHint: Airport and route network (offline OurAirports + OpenFlights data). Live fares via Duffel in flight search.
destination.connectivityDisclaimer: Offline network and indicative fares. Live prices via Duffel search.

tripgo.title: Getting around (local transport)
tripgo.subtitle: Airport → city center: local Valhalla (OSM, no cloud API) or TripGo when configured.
tripgo.notConfigured: Local demo: OTP (npm run otp:up) + Valhalla (docker compose up valhalla -d). See data/opentripplanner/README.md.

destination.reservationCtaDesc: Find the best flights and hotels for {name} with AKMLEVA.

enrich.flightEstimateHint: Great-circle heuristic (OurAirports). Live fares via Duffel search.
enrich.budgetFromDb: Cost of living from Neon database.
enrich.budgetFromUnwto: UNWTO tourism spend ({year}) blended with cost of living.
enrich.culturalHint: UNESCO, Wikivoyage and (future) national museum APIs / OSM.
enrich.culturalSourcesHint: Next sources for {sources}: curated national datasets.
